notes: Phase 2 / Tier 15 (Throne of Thunder) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins MoP Classic Shadow Priest gear guide. Tier set: Exorcist line. Wrists and Trinket 1 sources are not individually named by Icy Veins beyond "Throne of Thunder" / a shared item also seen on other caster lists (Frostborn Wristwraps ~ Megaera; Breath of the Hydra ~ Megaera). Enchants/gems reused from the mop-p3 (Siege of Orgrimmar) list.
